Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Interface BotSettings.BuildStep

Enclosing class:
BotSettings
public static interface BotSettings.BuildStep
Final step: builds immutable settings.

    • build

      BotSettings build()
      Builds immutable settings after validation.
      Returns:
      immutable bot settings
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any configured rule is invalid or inconsistent
